g.text: Ring Buffer vs Perf Event Array: Kernel-to-Userspace Event Streaming
Metric | Perf Event Array | BPF Ring Buffer
Data Types | Fixed Size Records | Variable Length Records
Performance | High contention on many CPUs | High efficiency, low wake-ups
Use when: Kernel < 5.8 or strict CPU isolation needed

ul.li: Single Mapped Buffer for all CPUs
